item.title: Junior Staff Post
item.content:encoded: The image used in SCP-2596 is non-compliant with the SCP wiki's license (CC-BY-SA 3.0) due to the presence of "NC" in the image's license. As such, the image has been taken down.

item.title: (no title)
item.content:encoded:
Though I'm a big fan of the story, I feel the crosslinks hurt more than help.

Novote.

item.title: (no title)
item.content:encoded:
I don't think you should reference any 001 proposal at all considering they are supposed to be secret and stuff.

Hence, the [DATA EXPUNGED] (as in, the data is completely removed in-universe). An actual SCP document is unlikely to have in-line links to other documents. Furthermore, since the data is expunged, you cannot say that it references an 001 proposal in-universe. I would perceive it as an out-of-universe Easter egg (and acknowledge of the nature of the auditory hallucinations).

Regardless, I do defend on its use. One headcanon I grow to have of SCP-001 (which began when I wrote my own 001 proposal) is that SCP-001 might be a thing rotated across multiple SCPs, which are edited to sound like they are nigh important to the Foundation's existence.

Also, Clef's Proposal provide a basis to compare with the auditory hallucinations (whose similarities might alert the in-universe Foundation to take quick note of, in fear that another high-priority SCP is compromised).

Ultimately, while you have your assertion, I see no reason why I would abide by your terms and I see no problem with my take on it.

"An arab living here illegally and joining a religious group with guns" also could be taken as political commentary.

Except that he did not join them. He was just living with the Malleus members, who decided not to kill him. He was more of a menial labourer for the actual Malleus members.

And he did not live there illegal. He was stuck in a place he has no idea how to get out of. Sticking with the Malleus members would be his best chance to live.

I would also guess that the cross with the diagonal would be that of Eastern Orthodox.

Yes.

item.title: (no title)
item.content:encoded: I don't think you should reference any 001 proposal at all considering they are supposed to be secret and stuff. "An arab living here illegally and joining a religious group with guns" also could be taken as political commentary. I would also guess that the cross with the diagonal would be that of Eastern Orthodox.

item.title: (no title)
item.content:encoded:
Now that I am using an image here, I think that line's purpose has been served and it lacks a place here.

Removed accordingly.

item.title: (no title)
item.content:encoded:
I thought this looked familiar. Nice to see it here! :)

These wounds are highly reminiscent of stigmata.

I suggest taking this out and letting the reader figure the significance out. Because there's a lot of that in this article, and this line stands out as a stark piece of telling.

item.title: (no title)
item.content:encoded: I was planning on downvoting this before it clicked what this object was. Have to admit, that…that's a dark thought. +1

item.title: (no title)
item.content:encoded: I like this - well plotted and laid out, with a nasty little sting when you're not expecting it. Good use of a less often used GoI.

item.title: Thanks, Attribution and Others
item.content:encoded:
Allow me to express thanks to the following (among others): TL333s, Leveritas, Dr Bob, Thetataur, Westrin et al.

Image by mobob of Flickr (https://www.flickr.com/photos/mobob/60721062/in/photolist-6ndfS-dqrB1H-RB4Sgq-nVPXYQ-qQ6TK8-6dsFqw-cRCxjo-4VhDaH-6FPKo2-6dQtVP-65dquc-iH36Ru-dD3C6E-5mdfoD-sjVXCU-dKV97Q-nhAQTs-HgysF-ej8QB-ctbh2w-5XQaLw-8nPcpT-bPSXjR-us1GR-GW8w9-a8JkCQ-9BWw7e-eaneMe-mHPMGp-dZZRVK-nrjPLK-NX3rn4-HjzreL-pSZfEf-bw27qf-m2oKtr-7MUxgq-6fWNa7-4U9ZDT-jdNDvr-mxjeb-iudCF-8Lwpac-6w9ZB3-a1z4Bv-5nWQ3-9oUd2-87CgvY-2gGiW-WRWYU) under CC BY-NC-SA 2.0

SCPs referenced here include:

  • Dr Clef's Proposal (The Gate Guardian) by DrClef
  • SCP-2198 (Mourning the World) by hambling
  • SCP-2897 (The Bard of Analytics) by GreenWolf

And re: other matters,

+ show block
– hide block


This SCP is a trap that sends the Heresy to their literal deaths, as planned by Malleus. That guy who held back the Foundation during the recovery was a spy from Malleus.

item.title: (no title)
item.content:encoded: Woot, you posted it. This is way better then when i last saw it.
